title: cyperus grammicus
intro: Cyperus grammicus, also known as the Narrow-Leaf Sedge or Gypsy Sedge, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus grammicus include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or dried herb, with the latter often used in teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
